title: potentilla reptans var. reptans
intro: Potentilla reptans var. reptans, commonly known as creeping cinquefoil, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. Creeping cinquefoil can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies and supplements.
